steps.t: Tûka is outside the tunnel of Halroth, which the Bright Company hopes to use to infiltrate Barad-dûr.
Tûka is outside the entrance of Halroth, a tunnel carved in the rocks of Mordor.
Tûka is outside the entrance of Halroth, a tunnel carved in the rocks of Mordor.
Vëamacil is at Adambel, and he wishes to speak with you.
The shade of Isildur is on Tol Send, waiting to tell you more of the tale of the Great Alliance.
Glorfindel is on Tol Send. Glorfindel has interrupted the shade of Isildur in his telling of the tale, and wishes to speak with you.
Gandalf is on Tol Send. He has listened with interest to the tale told by the shade of Isildur, but does not understand the need for Glorfindel's inte…
Glorfindel is on Tol Send, and he has volunteered to complete the tale begun by the shade of Isildur, despite his misgivings.
